# Broken Telephone

### Use this box to type your answer to the question sent by Wen!
> Use the information Wen attached to the message he sent you (i.e. the previous person's attempt). When you are done, copy your text and send it back to Wen!<br/><br/>

<small>Note that some phrases have been banned to increase the difficulty!</small>

  var _c = {};
  async function h(s) {
    if (_c[s]) return _c[s];
    var buf = await crypto.subtle.digest("SHA-256", new TextEncoder().encode(s));
    var a = new Uint8Array(buf);
    var r = "";
    for (var i = 0; i < a.length; i++) r += a[i].toString(16).padStart(2, "0");
    _c[s] = r;
    return r;
  }

  async function chk(word) {
    var w = word.toLowerCase();
    if (/[0-9]/.test(word)) return true;
    if (E.has(await h(w))) return true;
    for (var i = 1; i <= w.length; i++) { if (P.has(await h(w.substring(0, i)))) return true; }
    for (var i = 1; i <= w.length; i++) { if (SU.has(await h(w.substring(w.length - i)))) return true; }
    return false;
  }

  function esc(s) {
    return s.replace(/&/g, "&amp;").replace(/</g, "&lt;").replace(/>/g, "&gt;");
  }

  async function analyze(text) {
    var tokens = text.match(/[a-zA-Z0-9]+|[^a-zA-Z0-9]+/g) || [];
    var html = "";
    var v = 0;
    for (var j = 0; j < tokens.length; j++) {
      var t = tokens[j];
      if (/[a-zA-Z0-9]/.test(t.charAt(0))) {
        if (await chk(t)) { v++; html += "<mark>" + esc(t) + "</mark>"; }
        else { html += esc(t); }
      } else { html += esc(t); }
    }
    return { h: html, v: v };
  }

  var inp = document.getElementById("bt-input");
  var hl = document.getElementById("bt-highlights");
  var bd = document.getElementById("bt-backdrop");
  var ctr = document.getElementById("bt-counter");
  var st = document.getElementById("bt-status");
  var cp = document.getElementById("bt-copy");
  if (!inp || !hl || !bd || !ctr || !st || !cp) return;

  var tid = null;
  inp.addEventListener("input", function() {
    ctr.textContent = inp.value.length + " / 256";
    clearTimeout(tid);
    tid = setTimeout(async function() {
      var text = inp.value;
      if (!text) {
        hl.innerHTML = "";
        st.textContent = "";
        st.style.color = "";
        cp.disabled = true;
        cp.style.opacity = "0.4";
        return;
      }
      var r = await analyze(text);
      hl.innerHTML = r.h;
      if (r.v > 0) {
        st.textContent = r.v + " violation" + (r.v > 1 ? "s" : "") + " found";
        st.style.color = "#f87171";
        cp.disabled = true;
        cp.style.opacity = "0.4";
      } else {
        st.textContent = "Ready to copy!";
        st.style.color = "#4ade80";
        cp.disabled = false;
        cp.style.opacity = "1";
      }
    }, 150);
  });

  inp.addEventListener("scroll", function() {
    bd.scrollTop = inp.scrollTop;
    bd.scrollLeft = inp.scrollLeft;
  });

  cp.addEventListener("click", function() {
    if (!cp.disabled && navigator.clipboard) {
      navigator.clipboard.writeText(inp.value).then(function() {
        var orig = cp.textContent;
        cp.textContent = "Copied!";
        setTimeout(function() { cp.textContent = orig; }, 2000);
      });
    }
  });
})();`}</script>
